expected_condition: low_load mean load < normal mean load
overload overloaded sectors > normal overloaded sectors
heavy/full collapse is not part of Phase 3
notes: Phase 3 should not include heavy_overload unless explicitly requested.

expected_condition: outage_sector attach rate <= normal attach rate
mixed_conflict overloaded sectors >= overload overloaded sectors - 1
notes: Allows one-sector tolerance because impairment may move UEs or traffic.

expected_condition: handover_stress risk score > normal risk score
handover_stress boundary UE ratio > normal boundary UE ratio
